label: Default tone multi-part dinner flow
text: Please come downstairs, wash your hands, and sit at the table for dinner.

label: Straightforward tone cleanup
text: Pick up your backpack and put your lunchbox in the kitchen.

label: Straightforward tone with fewer words
text: Turn off the TV and head upstairs for bath time.

label: Humorous tone homework start
text: We need to start homework before it gets too late.

label: Humorous tone bedtime sequence
text: Brush your teeth, put on pajamas, and get into bed.

label: Equalizing tone errand preparation
text: Get your coat and help me check if we have everything for the car.

label: Equalizing tone shorter prompt
text: Come look at this and tell me if I missed a step for bedtime.

label: Interest Based with explicit interest
text: Please put your socks on and grab your backpack so we can leave for school.

label: Interest Based with fewer words
text: Wash your hands and come to the kitchen for lunch.

label: Generate more follow-up case
text: Get your shoes on and come to the car.

existingTranslations.translation: The car is ready, and shoes are part of getting out the door.
It looks like shoes and heading to the car are the next part.
The driveway is waiting, and shoes help with getting there.
I wonder what would make shoes and the walk to the car feel easier.

label: Generate more follow-up with interest
text: Please come to the bathroom, brush your teeth, and bring your dinosaur to bed.

existingTranslations.translation: The bathroom is the next stop, and the dinosaur can head to bed after teeth are done.
It looks like toothbrush time came before the dinosaur bedtime expedition.
The sink is ready, and the dinosaur can travel to bed when teeth are sorted out.
I wonder how the dinosaur bedtime route goes once teeth are taken care of.
